heading: Notification to claimants
label: 4142 Notification to claimants
text: Each award or denial of a claim by the Commission, whether rendered before or after a hearing, shall include a specific statement of the facts and of the reasoning of the Commission in support of its conclusion.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 2017k of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
